items.draft_reply:
Dear Daniel,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We received the referral from Dr. Priya Nair at Northside Pediatrics for Emma's speech-language evaluation and we're excited to welcome her.

We have a potential appointment opening on Thursday, May 1st at 3:30 PM with Maya Chen, MS CCC-SLP, which aligns with your after-school Tuesday/Thursday preference. Our team is reviewing availability and insurance details — please note this is not yet a confirmed appointment.

A member of our intake team will contact you shortly at 555-0101 to confirm the appointment, review insurance (Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO), and send over new patient paperwork.

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach us by phone or through our patient portal.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
items.decision_rationale: This is a complete, clean new SLP referral for a new patient (no existing record found). Insurance was verified as active in-network (BCBS PPO), but the billing system flagged prior authorization as required, so a billing task was created before the slot can be confirmed. A pending-review hold was placed on the best-matching slot (Thu May 1, 3:30 PM, after-school, with Maya Chen) per scheduling policy; no appointment was booked. Urgency is standard P2 — no safeguarding concerns, no same-day operational issues.

items.draft_reply: Hi, this is Cedar Kids Therapy calling for Maria Gomez. We received your voicemail about Leo and want to thank you for reaching out to us. A member of our team will be calling you back shortly to follow up. If you need to reach us before then, please call our main office. Thank you.

escalation.reason: Mother's voicemail includes a disclosure that the child's father "started getting rough with him during weekends." This language may indicate physical harm or unsafe caregiving of a 6-year-old child and requires immediate clinical lead review under safeguarding protocol.

items.decision_rationale: The voicemail contains a potential abuse/unsafe caregiving disclosure ("dad started getting rough with him"), which meets the P0 safeguarding threshold under Cedar Kids policy regardless of any accompanying routine request. Leo is not an existing patient. No scheduling, clinical advice, or investigative guidance was provided; only a neutral acknowledgement was drafted. The clinical lead must review mandatory reporting obligations before any further action is taken on this referral.

args.reason: Mother's voicemail includes a disclosure that the child's father "started getting rough with him during weekends." This language may indicate physical harm or unsafe caregiving of a 6-year-old child and requires immediate clinical lead review under safeguarding protocol.

args.notes: Mother Maria Gomez called (555-0102) on Sunday 4/27 requesting a speech eval for her 6-year-old son Leo. During the voicemail she stated: "he has been more clingy since his dad started getting rough with him during weekends." This language may indicate physical harm or unsafe caregiving. Child is NOT currently a Cedar Kids patient. Escalation ID: esc_01ksn58fh63qz2mwjwm6k8jk8c. Clinical lead must review immediately and determine mandatory reporting obligations before any further scheduling or clinical contact occurs. Do NOT provide investigative advice to the family.
args.title: P0 SAFEGUARDING: Potential harm disclosure — Leo Gomez (age 6)

args.body: Hi, this is Cedar Kids Therapy calling for Maria Gomez. We received your voicemail about Leo and want to thank you for reaching out to us. A member of our team will be calling you back shortly to follow up. If you need to reach us before then, please call our main office. Thank you.

items.recommended_next_action: Billing must complete an out-of-network benefits conversation with Rachel Brooks before any slot is held; intake should proceed with scheduling only after benefits are resolved.
items.draft_reply:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We received a referral from Dr. Helena Yu at Westside Pediatrics for an occupational therapy evaluation for Owen, and we're glad to connect with your family.

Before we can schedule an appointment, we want to make sure you have all the information you need regarding coverage. Owen's insurance plan (Kaiser HMO) is currently out-of-network with our practice, which means we'll need to have a quick benefits conversation with you to review your out-of-network benefits and discuss any potential costs before proceeding.

A member of our billing team will be reaching out to you shortly at 555-0103 to walk you through this. If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to contact us.

We look forward to speaking with you soon!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
items.decision_rationale: This is a complete new OT referral with all intake fields present and no safeguarding concerns. Insurance verification confirmed Kaiser HMO is out-of-network, triggering the mandatory benefits conversation policy before any slot can be held. No slot was held; billing and intake tasks were created to ensure the correct sequence of steps is followed before scheduling proceeds.

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Parent asking whether inability to produce R sounds at age 4 is developmentally normal; seeking advice on whether to seek therapy or wait

missing_info: Whether family is interested in scheduling an evaluation or screening
items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead should review the developmental question about R sounds and either respond directly to Jordan Kim or approve a templated response; consider offering a free screening call to guide next steps.
items.draft_reply:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for reaching out about Ava! We're glad you felt comfortable asking.

Questions about speech sound development are a great reason to connect with one of our speech-language pathologists. Our clinical team will be in touch shortly to help point you in the right direction — whether that's a brief screening call, a full evaluation, or simply some guidance on next steps.

We appreciate your patience over the weekend and look forward to speaking with you soon.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
items.decision_rationale: The parent is asking a clinical question about typical speech sound development (R sounds at age 4), which falls squarely under the clinical advice policy — front desk and automated systems must not respond with developmental guidance. No existing patient record was found for Ava Kim, so this is also a potential new family. The item is routed to the clinical lead for an appropriate response and a possible screening offer, which is the correct pathway rather than providing advice directly.

args.notes: Parent Jordan Kim (portal message, item_5) is asking whether it is developmentally normal for their 4-year-old daughter Ava to not yet produce R sounds, and whether they should wait until kindergarten. No patient record found (Ava Kim not in system). Per policy, front desk cannot advise — clinical lead should review and either respond directly or approve a templated response. Consider offering a free screening call if available.
args.title: Clinical question: R-sound development in 4-year-old (Ava Kim)

items.recommended_next_action: Intake team should call Lakeview Pediatrics today to collect the four missing fields (DOB, parent/guardian contact, payer, and member ID) before any slot can be held or insurance verified.
items.draft_reply:
Hello, this is Cedar Kids Therapy reaching out regarding a fax referral received from Dr. Omar Keene for patient Sam Taylor (SLP – speech delay). Thank you for thinking of us!

To proceed with scheduling an evaluation, we are missing several required fields from the referral:

1. Child's date of birth
2. Parent/guardian name and contact information (phone number and/or email)
3. Insurance payer name
4. Insurance member ID

Could you please provide these details at your earliest convenience? Once we have the complete information, we will be happy to move forward with intake and get Sam scheduled. You can reach our intake team by phone or by faxing an updated referral form.

Thank you very much!
items.decision_rationale: This fax referral from Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics is missing four critical fields — DOB, parent/guardian contact, insurance payer, and member ID — making it impossible to search the patient record fully, verify insurance, or hold any slot. No existing patient record was found under "Sam Taylor" without a DOB to narrow the match. The referral is classified as missing_paperwork at P2 (normal workflow) since there are no safeguarding, clinical urgency, or same-day operational triggers present.

args.notes: Fax referral received 2026-04-28 from Dr. Omar Keene at Lakeview Pediatrics for SLP (speech delay, school-age child). Contact Lakeview Pediatrics to obtain all missing information before any slot can be held. Referral attachment: referral_item_6.pdf.

items.recommended_next_action: Intake staff should review the Spanish-language draft phone message, call Ana Lopez at 555-0107 today to confirm the April 30 slot hold with Lucía Morales, collect Isabella's exact DOB, and initiate intake paperwork.
items.draft_reply:
Hola Ana, le llamamos de Cedar Kids Therapy. Gracias por contactarnos para Isabella.

Hemos recibido su mensaje y nos complace informarle que el seguro Medicaid de Isabella está verificado y activo, sin costo de copago para usted.

Tenemos disponible una evaluación de habla con nuestra terapeuta bilingüe (español/inglés), Lucía Morales, MA CCC-SLP, el jueves 30 de abril a las 11:00 a.m. También hay disponibilidad el lunes 5 de mayo a las 2:00 p.m. si esa fecha le viene mejor.

Hemos reservado un lugar para Isabella de forma provisional mientras esperamos su confirmación. Por favor llámenos al número de la clínica para confirmar la cita o si tiene alguna pregunta.

Estamos encantados de atender a Isabella. ¡Hasta pronto!
items.decision_rationale: This is a straightforward new SLP referral for a 5-year-old Spanish-speaking child with active Medicaid (verified in-network, $0 copay, no auth required) — no safety concerns and no out-of-network complexity, so P2 is appropriate. Language access policy requires a Spanish-capable provider match; Lucía Morales (bilingual SLP) has an evaluation slot on April 30 which has been placed on a pending-review hold. The draft outbound message has been written in Spanish as required; exact DOB is missing and must be collected during intake confirmation call.

items.draft_reply:
Hi Anita,

We're sorry to hear Noah isn't feeling well — we hope he feels better soon!

We've received your message about today's 3pm OT appointment and have flagged it for our team to handle right away. A staff member will reach out to you shortly at 555-0108 or via email to find a makeup time that works for your schedule.

Thank you for letting us know as soon as possible!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy
